sentiment.reasoning: Securing a $50M contract is a clear positive financial event, indicating new revenue.

headlines.headline: Zrovum Biopharma revises long-term strategy with focus on precision manufacturing

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
